creator: sarumaru@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix build error on 10 branch and head.

Fix: Add following patch file.
	or just add -Wno-return-prototype to CFLAGS like manner until 9-STABLE,
	but this patch also fixes one missing argument error
	that potentially cause a runtime error.
How-To-Repeat: 	Build japanese/rogue_s on 10-STABLE or CURRENT.
